title: Schedule Follow-Up for Suspicious Lung Nodules
summary: Detect lung nodule follow-up language in radiology text and draft surveillance next steps.
problem_statement: Incidental or suspicious nodules can be documented in reports without reliable follow-up closure.

inputs.name: report_text
inputs.description: Chest CT or thoracic imaging report text.

inputs.name: completion_state
inputs.description: Whether surveillance imaging has already been scheduled.

rule_sets.summary: If suspicious nodule language exists and surveillance is not closed, draft guideline-aligned follow-up.

actions.label: Create nodule review item
actions.description: Queue a radiology or pulmonary review.

examples: There is a suspicious pulmonary nodule and 6-month CT follow-up is advised.
